model_comparison: Both models accurately synthesize the text without errors. Model 1 excels in the '严肃认真' dimension. Model 2 delivers the lines seriously, but the vocal characteristics and delivery style feel slightly lighter and less imposing, making the 'seriousness' feel less authoritative than Model 1. Therefore, Model 1 captures the specific gravity of the prompt more effectively.
